# anthropic_workspace_service_accounts (Data Source)

Lists all service accounts that are members of a workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_workspace_service_accounts" "prod_sas" {
  workspace_id = "wrkspc_01JwQvzr7rXLA5AGx3HKfFUJ"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `service_accounts` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--service_accounts))

<a id="nestedatt--service_accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `service_accounts`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `implicit` (Boolean)
- `service_account_id` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)
- `workspace_role` (String)
